rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies the redundant `ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial'` theorem (visible at lines 71-72 of the diff), which derives `True` from a `True`-valued class field and carries no mathematical content — a maintainer would clearly want it removed. Review 2 misses this entirely, leaving noise in the API; the proof-style finding is plausible but unverifiable without running Lean.
